# Toss Invest Vendored Docs

This directory stores local copies of Toss Invest Open API material because the public docs page is JavaScript-rendered and not reliably readable by coding agents.

## Files

| File | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `openapi-1.0.3.json` | Exact pasted OpenAPI 3.1 document for 토스증권 Open API version 1.0.3. |

## Provenance

The user provided nine pasted attachments for the Toss OpenAPI content. All nine files had the same byte length and the same SHA-256 prefix:

- Bytes: `249746`
- SHA-256 prefix: `C8856CB35B54`

The duplicate attachments were deduplicated into one local source file.

Official locations mentioned by the docs:

- Human docs: `https://developers.tossinvest.com/docs`
- LLM guide: `https://developers.tossinvest.com/llms.txt`
- Canonical OpenAPI JSON: `https://openapi.tossinvest.com/openapi-docs/latest/openapi.json`

When implementing against this API, prefer regenerating clients from `openapi-1.0.3.json` rather than manually copying schemas from rendered docs.
